productDisplayName: United Colors Of Benetton Women Light Wintersweat Green Sweatshirts
description: Composition Green hooded jacket made of 100% cotton, with a full front zipper and ribbed hem, full arn sleeves with ribbed hems, attached hood and Big Ben logo in metallic embellishments on left chest Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash, dry and iron inside out Machine wash delicate at 30 degrees with a mild detergent Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Dry flat in shade Cool iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery Keep the chill away and enjoy the winter in style in this hooded jacket from united colors of benetton. The closed neck and full arm sleeves are sure to keep the cold at bay, while you warm up to steaming hot street-food in style. Pair this with jeans and sports shoes for unparalleled cool. Model statistics The model wears size M in jackets Height: 5'8", Chest: 33"
